data.body: 14/19 committed (6619 done). Stack tip 5b2ed07bd. 6c4b (central git adapter) delegated — key insight from plan-review: reuse existing rebar._store.gitutil.run_git rather than duplicate a wrapper; carry c9a5 F14 fix forward; large test-patch surface (many tests patch per-module subprocess) so keep suite green. Remaining: 6c4b, 5274, 7c92, 9f40, 44be(last, sub-package whole reconciler). Endgame after: rebase, full make test, push, close after Verified, submit.
